name: kiva-design-to-code
description: Turning Kiva designs into compliant code: the Kiva Tailwind preset, plus audits/migrations that bring consuming repos into design-system alignment.

interface.shortDescription: Kiva Tailwind preset plus design-system audits and migrations
interface.longDescription: Developer tooling for translating Kiva's design system into compliant code: how the @kiva/kv-tokens Tailwind preset changes stock Tailwind, and a page-design audit that brings a route's typography and spacing into design-system alignment with before/after screenshots.
